STRUCTURING.description: Deliberate splitting of transactions to avoid CTR (Cash Transaction Report) threshold of INR 10 Lakh.
STRUCTURING.penalty: Rigorous imprisonment for 3 to 7 years and fine up to INR 5 Lakh.
STRUCTURING.fatf_ref: FATF Recommendation 20 — Reporting of Suspicious Transactions

LAYERING.description: Engaging in complex tiers of transactions to distance illicit funds from their source, often via international wire transfers.
LAYERING.penalty: Imprisonment for 3 to 7 years and attachment of property involved in money laundering.

SMURFING.description: The use of multiple runners or 'smurfs' to conduct small transactions under the reporting threshold to aggregate large sums.
SMURFING.penalty: Strict regulatory penalties plus imprisonment for laundering attempts.
SMURFING.fatf_ref: FATF Recommendation 26 — Regulation & Supervision of Financial Institutions

HIGH_VALUE.description: Unusually large transaction exceeding account profile and historical averages.
HIGH_VALUE.penalty: Enhanced due diligence requirement; failure to report leads to fine under Section 13.
